name: problem-solution
description: Compact demo-first ad for functional products: Hook → Problem shown visually → Demo with one sharp benefit → CTA. ~26s.

beats.title: Hook
beats.goal: Name the pain in the viewer's own words within 3 seconds (first-person creator or general-truth phrasing — never 'Do you struggle with…')

beats.title: Problem
beats.goal: Show the frustrating status quo happening on camera — concrete, sensory, relatable

beats.title: Demo
beats.goal: The product visibly solving it, one sharp benefit stated plainly, label readable

beats.title: Call To Action
beats.goal: One clear action with a reason to act now
